creator: Christopher.davidson@gmail.com
text:
The setup I took was in the original bug report (that was done in the non-poudriere way).

I think at this point, since it DOES work in a poudriere environment, i will play around and see if i can replicate it outside of it. I rather do that than waste your time trying to hunt down a nuance that is just probably some edge case.

If you are okay with that, i will close out this bug.
